title: Atlanta Heat Wave
lead: Atlanta is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.34. This anomaly has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Atlanta has resulted in a high CDD of 10.7 GG, with zero HDD. 
 The relative humidity is at 57%, and wind speed is 12.2 km/h. 
 These conditions will persist, causing significant disruptions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
